steps.title: Prerequisites
steps.body: Bridge running. Optional extension-matrix check (automated-covered): confirm `.controller` is accepted and round-tripped. The supported-extension surface is asserted by the automated test; this is a runnable confidence pass. The bundled demo has no `.controller` asset, so point the `fs_copy` source (and the reserialize path) at a real AnimatorController in your project before running setup.

steps.title: Stage a copy of a .controller (adjust the source path)
Expected outcomes
items: file on disk is canonical Unity YAML

reset.note: Optional, automated-covered scenario. The supported-extension contract is asserted by ReserializeAssetsToolTests; this runnable pass is for operator confidence. The demo ships no .controller, so adjust the source path before running.
